area_description: Multi-Modal LLMs encompass techniques for integrating visual, auditory, and other modalities with large language models, spanning vision-language architectures, multimodal pretraining and alignment, video understanding, multimodal generation, multimodal reasoning, and efficient architecture design.

categories.name: Vision-Language Models
categories.description: Models that jointly process visual and textual inputs to perform tasks such as image understanding, visual question answering, image captioning, and visual grounding, typically by connecting a visual encoder with an LLM backbone.

sub_topics.name: Image Understanding
sub_topics.description: Methods for enabling LLMs to perceive and interpret image content, including scene recognition, object detection, and visual attribute extraction.

sub_topics.name: Visual Question Answering
sub_topics.description: Approaches for answering natural language questions about images by combining visual and linguistic reasoning.

sub_topics.name: Image Captioning
sub_topics.description: Generating natural language descriptions of images using vision-language models, including detailed and region-specific captioning.

sub_topics.name: Visual Grounding
sub_topics.description: Localizing objects, regions, or visual elements in images based on natural language descriptions, including referring expression comprehension and phrase grounding.

categories.name: Multimodal Pretraining and Alignment
categories.description: Pretraining and alignment strategies that learn joint representations across visual and textual modalities, including contrastive learning, generative pretraining, vision-language alignment, and multimodal instruction tuning.

sub_topics.name: Contrastive Learning
sub_topics.description: Learning aligned visual and textual representations by contrasting matched and unmatched image-text pairs, exemplified by CLIP-style approaches.

sub_topics.name: Generative Pretraining
sub_topics.description: Pretraining multimodal models with generative objectives such as next-token prediction or masked region prediction across vision and language.

sub_topics.name: Alignment Training
sub_topics.description: Techniques for aligning visual features with the language model embedding space, including linear projection training, cross-modal alignment, and feature bridging.

sub_topics.name: Multimodal Instruction Tuning
sub_topics.description: Fine-tuning multimodal models on instruction-following datasets to improve task generalization and user interaction quality.

categories.name: Video Understanding
categories.description: Methods for processing and comprehending video content with LLMs, including video captioning, video question answering, temporal reasoning, and action recognition.

sub_topics.name: Video Captioning
sub_topics.description: Generating natural language descriptions of video content, including dense video captioning and temporally grounded narration.

sub_topics.name: Video Question Answering
sub_topics.description: Answering natural language questions about video content by jointly reasoning over visual frames and temporal dynamics.

sub_topics.name: Temporal Reasoning
sub_topics.description: Understanding temporal relationships, event ordering, and temporal dynamics in videos using LLMs.

sub_topics.name: Action Recognition with LLMs
sub_topics.description: Leveraging LLMs for recognizing and classifying human actions and activities in video, including zero-shot and open-vocabulary action recognition.

categories.name: Multimodal Generation
categories.description: Techniques that use LLMs to generate or manipulate visual content, including text-to-image synthesis, text-to-video generation, LLM-guided image editing, and layout generation.

sub_topics.name: Text-to-Image Generation
sub_topics.description: Generating images from textual descriptions using LLM-integrated approaches, including diffusion model integration and autoregressive visual generation.

sub_topics.name: Text-to-Video Generation
sub_topics.description: Generating video sequences from textual descriptions, leveraging LLMs for planning, layout, or direct autoregressive video generation.

sub_topics.name: Image Editing with LLMs
sub_topics.description: Using LLMs to perform or guide image editing operations through natural language instructions, including instruction-based editing and inpainting.

sub_topics.name: Layout Generation
sub_topics.description: Generating spatial layouts, UI designs, or scene compositions using LLMs, including document layout and 3D scene layout from text.

categories.name: Multimodal Reasoning
categories.description: Techniques for complex reasoning over visual and textual inputs, including visual reasoning, chart and document understanding, spatial reasoning, and scientific figure interpretation.

sub_topics.name: Visual Reasoning
sub_topics.description: Complex multi-step reasoning over visual inputs, including compositional reasoning, visual logic, and visual chain-of-thought approaches.

sub_topics.name: Chart and Document Understanding
sub_topics.description: Understanding and extracting information from charts, tables, documents, and infographics using multimodal models.

sub_topics.name: Spatial Reasoning
sub_topics.description: Understanding spatial relationships, positions, orientations, and 3D structure from visual inputs using multimodal models.

sub_topics.name: Scientific Figure Understanding
sub_topics.description: Interpreting and reasoning about scientific figures, diagrams, plots, and technical illustrations using multimodal models.

categories.name: Architecture Design
categories.description: Architectural innovations for multimodal models, including visual encoder design, projection layers connecting vision and language, token merging strategies, and efficient multimodal architectures.

sub_topics.name: Visual Encoders
sub_topics.description: Design and selection of visual encoders (e.g., ViT, convolution-based, hybrid) for extracting visual features in multimodal models.

sub_topics.name: Projection Layers
sub_topics.description: Modules that bridge visual encoder outputs to LLM input space, including linear projectors, cross-attention connectors, Q-Former, and other bridging architectures.

sub_topics.name: Token Merging and Compression
sub_topics.description: Strategies for reducing the number of visual tokens to improve efficiency, including token merging, pruning, pooling, and dynamic resolution approaches.

sub_topics.name: Efficient Multimodal Architectures
sub_topics.description: Designing lightweight and computationally efficient multimodal architectures, including parameter-efficient tuning, adapter-based approaches, and model compression for multimodal systems.

theme.name: Hallucination in Multimodal Models
theme.description: Papers addressing object hallucination, factual inconsistency, and faithfulness issues in multimodal models, including detection and mitigation strategies.

theme.name: Embodied AI
theme.description: Papers on grounding multimodal LLMs in physical environments for robotics, navigation, manipulation, and embodied reasoning tasks.

theme.name: Document Understanding
theme.description: Papers focused on end-to-end understanding of documents including OCR, layout analysis, document parsing, and information extraction from visually rich documents.

theme.name: Analysis
theme.description: Papers where experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of baseline solutions, showing gaps and future directions.

theme.name: Benchmark
theme.description: Papers that introduce new benchmark datasets and evaluation metrics.

theme.name: Application
theme.description: Papers that show how to apply the techniques to a specific domain or task, highlighting its strengths and gaps.

theme.name: Survey
theme.description: Papers that provide a comprehensive overview of the current state of the art, including its taxonomy, advantages and limitations.
